claims.claim: Across 60 deterministic sweep scenarios spanning three DAG sizes and four heterogeneity levels, the shadow router projected mean makespan improvement of 44.3% (range 29.5%–61.9%) and mean p95 DAG latency improvement of 48.9% (range 31.7%–higher), with mean routing overhead of 26.8 ms and maximum overhead of 74.5 ms.
